body: Board meeting tonight 6pm at the district office. Leave the ranch by 5:15 to make it.
Sage Creek parents meeting Thursday 7pm, Cody library. Spread the word.
Snow coming in over Sylvan Pass tonight. Drive careful heading to town.
Roy, the north pasture gate is open. Can you check it when you get a chance.
Maria is coming by Saturday about the coalition flyers. Plan on midmorning.
Yard signs are in. Pick some up at the ranch this weekend.
Coffee and rolls at the volunteer meeting Friday, 9 at the grange hall.
Roads are iced past the cattle guard. Give it till noon before you head out.
Gary wants the enrollment numbers before Thursday. I will send what I have.
James, call your sister when you are off the line. She has been trying to reach you.
Reminder: the school board vote is set for Nov 10. We need a full house.
Wind River Society talk got pushed to 7. Same link as last time.
Picking up feed in Cody tomorrow. Let me know if you need anything from town.
Walt, the coalition meeting is at the church basement, not the library.
Storm warning through the weekend. Stay off the pass if you can.
Sign-up sheet for the phone tree is at the grange. Add your name.
Barbara, can you bring the sign-in sheets to the meeting tonight.
Consolidation hearing got moved to next Tuesday. Pass it along.
Sarah, made it to town fine. Roads were not bad. Call you tonight.
Crawford is opening the church for the meeting at 6:30. Door is around back.
Reminder: leave-by 5:30 for the board work session. Snow on the highway.
Need help stuffing envelopes for the Pronghorn Valley mailing. Saturday at the ranch.
Robert, the truck is ready at the shop. Can you run me in after chores.
Public comment sign-up closes at 5. Get your name on the list.
Gary, got your message. I will have the busing figures for the board by Friday.
Katie, I left the calf medicine on the porch. Take it when you head out.
Volunteer carpool to the county seat leaves the grange at 4:45 sharp.
Maria, the petition copies are printed. I will drop them at the clinic Monday.
Pancake breakfast fundraiser is this Saturday. Bring the family.
Walt, can you cover the door at the meeting. I will be running late from chores.
Thaw is making a mess of the county road. Allow extra time into Cody.
Crawford, thanks again for the hall. Coalition meets next on the 24th.
Reminder: turn in your testimony cards to Barbara before the hearing.
Dr. Prescott, confirming Charles for the 10am Tuesday. He will be there.
Board meeting tonight 6pm. Leave the ranch by 5:15. Roads are clear.
Yard signs restocked. Volunteers can grab them at the ranch tomorrow.
Maria, the flyers are ready. I will swing them by the clinic in the morning.
Volunteer meeting moved to Friday 9am at the grange. Coffee is on.
Old number for the Pronghorn Valley list. Bounced. Need to update it.
Weather alert for the volunteer carpool. Number is out of service.
